mapper.select:
SELECT a.* FROM ums_admin a WHERE 1=1
AND ( a.username LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{keyword}), '%') OR a.nick_name LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{keyword}), '%') )
and a.username like CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{nickName}), '%')
and a.nick_name like CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{userName}), '%')
ORDER BY a.sort
